subcodes.first_line: Concerning what thou didst write regarding thy spiritual beloved, his honour Muhammad-Javád, verily he is among [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اینکه در باره حبیب روحانی جناب آقا محمد جواد مرقوم داشتند فی الحقیقه ایشان از
subcodes.subjects: @law of Huququ'llah, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
